_comment: Add people you already know here. Fields: name, handle, context (how you know them), what_they_do, notes, public_info (optional freeform).

_example.name: Jane Smith
_example.context: Met at NeurIPS 2025 workshop on geometry
_example.what_they_do: PhD @ MIT, generative models for 3D shapes
